release_scope: Accepted-paper cached outputs and measurement-grounded calibration data

assets.transformation: Retained aggregated warm, cold, and burst profiles plus architecture-specific LightGBM surrogates; removed invocation-level records, logs, figures, deployment files, timestamps, and host metadata.

assets.source_id: three-seed full-48 CALO experiment outputs (42, 52, and 62)
assets.transformation: Retained final simulator JSON and aggregate tables; omitted partial results, checkpoints, plots, and run logs.

assets.source_id: load-only, embedding, feature-attribution, and reward-sensitivity aggregates
assets.transformation: Retained aggregate JSON only and removed non-public source paths.
Retained target-level numeric summaries and ranking aggregates; removed function deployment names, caches, logs, tables, and infrastructure data.
Retained aggregate policy metrics, pairwise comparisons, protocol parameters, and workload sequences; removed deployed function names, per-step invocation records, runtime logs, and plots.

evidence_boundaries.simulator: The five-benchmark full-48 policy comparison is simulator-based and uses both x64 and ARM64 measurement calibration.
evidence_boundaries.fixed_openwhisk: The fixed sweep contains 120 x64 targets, of which 112 produced complete warm and cold captures.
evidence_boundaries.adaptive_replay: The real-platform online evidence is limited to the eight released focused replay cases.
evidence_boundaries.not_released: The Azure trace corpus, raw OpenWhisk invocations, deployment collection chain, historical archives, paper PDF, and unconfirmed PPO checkpoints are not part of v1.0.0.
